chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-723 of 2026 [Orangzaib & another v. Province of Sindh & others] DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) Present: Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. Riazat Ali Sahar J. 1. For orders on M.A. No.2968/2026. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.2969/2026. 4. For orders on M.A. No.2970/2026. 5. For hearing of main case. 21.04.2026 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Janwari, Advocate along-with Petitioners. == Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J- Urgency granted. Exemption application is granted subject to all just exceptions. The prayer of the petitioner is for quashing FIR No.161/2026 lodged at PS Qasimabad for offences under sections 489-F, 506/2, 34 PPC. Admittedly, the FIR is still under investigation. Learned counsel for the petitioner does not advance any compelling reason to interfere in such investigation in the exercise of writ jurisdiction. Suffice to observe that as and when the challan is submitted before the concerned Magistrate, the petitioner will have an alternate remedy for seeking pre-mature acquittal by invoking section 249-A Cr.P.C. With that observation, the petition is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
